spec.long_desc: A ring of dark green stone set in twisted silver lies here.
spec.detailed_desc: A ring of dark green stone — jade, or something close to it — mounted in a twist of tarnished silver that has moulded itself to the stone as though grown there. It carries a faint smell of the web-silk that surrounded it for so long, and wearing it produces a sensation of something being kept at a careful distance. The stone has a depth to it that rewards looking at.
